title: Validation report for cdif.bbr.metadata.cdifProperties.cdifVariableMeasured - VariableMeasured with DDI-CDI extensions

entries.message: Test was expected to fail and it did.
Using affiliation-fail.json from test resources
JSON-LD context is present - uplifting
Output JSON-LD affiliation-fail.jsonld created
Output Turtle affiliation-fail.ttl created

ValidationError: 'schema:Person' is not of type 'array'

Failed validating 'type' in schema[0]['properties']['@type']:
    {'contains': {'const': 'cdi:InstanceVariable'},
     'description': 'Must include both schema:PropertyValue and '
                    'cdi:InstanceVariable. Additional types may be '
                    'included.',
     'items': {'type': 'string'},
     'type': 'array'}

On instance['@type']:
    'schema:Person'
